doc.question: Today is 05/17/2008. What is the date 14 days from now in MM/DD/YYYY?

arguments:
<bos><start_of_turn>user
Always end your response with: The answer is <your answer>.

2015 is coming in 36 hours. What is the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Step 1: Convert hours to days. 36 hours = 2 days. Step 2: Calculate date. 01/01/2015 - 2 days = 12/30/2014. Step 3: Calculate date. 12/30/2014 + 7 days = 01/05/2015. The answer is 01/05/2015.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user
The first day of 2019 is a Tuesday, and today is the first Monday of 2019. What is the date today in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Step 1: 01/01/2019 is Tuesday. Step 2: Find amount of needed days. First Monday is +6 days. Step 3: 01/07/2019. The answer is 01/07/2019.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user

<start_of_turn>user

<start_of_turn>model

<bos><start_of_turn>user
Always end your response with: The answer is <your answer>.

2015 is coming in 36 hours. What is the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Step 1: Convert hours to days. 36 hours = 2 days. Step 2: Calculate date. 01/01/2015 - 2 days = 12/30/2014. Step 3: Calculate date. 12/30/2014 + 7 days = 01/05/2015. The answer is 01/05/2015.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user
The first day of 2019 is a Tuesday, and today is the first Monday of 2019. What is the date today in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Step 1: 01/01/2019 is Tuesday. Step 2: Find amount of needed days. First Monday is +6 days. Step 3: 01/07/2019. The answer is 01/07/2019.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user
The concert was scheduled to be on 06/01/1943, but was delayed by one day to today. What is the date 10 days ago in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Step 1: 06/01/1943 + 1 day = 06/02/1943. Step 2: 06/02/1943 - 10 days = 05/23/1943. The answer is 05/23/1943.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user
It is 4/19/1969 today. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Step 1: Calculate date. 04/19/1969 + 1 day = 04/20/1969. The answer is 04/20/1969.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user

<start_of_turn>model
Step 1: Correct date. 03/12/2002. Step 2: Calculate date. 03/12/2002 + 1 day = 03/13/2002. The answer is 03/13/2002.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user

<start_of_turn>model
Step 1: Birthdate 02/28/2001. Step 2: Calculate date. 02/28/2001 + 16 years = 02/28/2017. Step 3: Yesterday = -1 day. 02/28/2001 - 1 day = 02/27/2017. The answer is 02/27/2017.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user
